mapper.insert: insert into lego_memory_items (id, policy_id, content, metadata, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{policyId}, #{content}, cast(#{metadataJson} as jsonb), coalesce(#{createdAt}, now()), #{updatedAt})
mapper.select:
select id, policy_id, content, cast(metadata as text) as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at from lego_memory_items where policy_id = #{policyId} and id in
#{id}
select id, policy_id, content, cast(metadata as text) as metadata_json, created_at, updated_at from lego_memory_items where policy_id = #{policyId} order by created_at asc
